creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

It's not clear why you want to install (eg) xscreensaver-gnome-hacks and 
xscreensaver at the same time - because both these ports install files 
into the same location,t hey are marked as conflicting so can't be 
installed at the same time. 

From your PR, it sounds like you may be trying to install every package 
available?  If that is the case, then that is not something that is 
usually done, and because some packages necessarily conflict, isn't 
something that would be expected to work.  Usually, you'd just install 
the packages you require (for example, KDE, etc). 

Can you explain more what you are trying to do> 

Thanks,
